incidents.effect: A benign reference-line mismatch reduced the exact shared target set from six to five and halted before live writes.
incidents.resolution: The telemetry adapter was corrected to classify skipReason; a later clean 75-second dry rerun passed all six pairs.

incidents.effect: The two makers posted 24 live commitments, but a false-negative capacity assertion halted before controlled fills.
incidents.resolution: Immutable metrics proved 12 odds streams, two owner streams, and 14 total connections within capacity; the parser was corrected and regression-tested. Cleanup then invalidated all 24 commitments through 18 successful shutdown transactions.

incidents.effect: A zero requested amount meant skip-not-requested rather than approve-zero.
incidents.resolution: Explicit USDC approve-zero transactions were used and direct current/stale allowances were verified zero for all four roles.

incidents.effect: A schema-v1 cancel-stale envelope without a top-level ok field was initially classified as failure despite terminal invalidation.
incidents.resolution: Structured payload/no-error parsing and terminal readback replaced the top-level-ok assumption.
